adjustments.rationale: Ch27 light-level micro-nuance correctly introduced but insufficient amplitude for reader fatigue risk. Ch28 upgrades to event-level micro-difference (door frame thermal gradient offset at 4th sample point after 4-chapter plateau). Three-beat structure (confirm→change→recover) embedded in natural door frame routine. Reader experiences parameter event rather than perceptual variance.

Ch26-Ch27 payoff dominated by accumulation (perceiving change) without event contact points. Ch28 embeds event-type payoff via door frame variance — change beat confirmed at 4th sample point with first non-zero reading in walking parameters. Event exists and completes within chapter — no extension, no analysis, no meaning assignment.

Intersection (assessment Saturday + collection deadline) completed from cognitive-association layer to sensory-baseline layer. Gray channel dialogue fragment mentions Saturday while walking body time naturally carries collection timeline — two times indistinguishable in same body frame. '不能分出哪一个是Saturday哪一个是催收——交汇在场——基底化了'. Downgraded from P0.

budget.pacing_notes: vol 2 day three — door frame produces first non-zero reading after 4-chapter plateau (Ch25 end→Ch26→Ch27→Ch28 morning). Three-beat structure (confirm→change→recover) completes within door frame check section. Assessment normalization transitions from 'needs registration' to 'background parameter' — signal density maintains Ch27 level (2-4/chapter) but qualitative shift: assessment presence processed like intersection direction info — automatically, without attention allocation. Intersection completes and downgraded from P0. Emotional baseline: quiet with event residue — event passes, baseline recovers, quiet carries parametric variance. Exit shorter and more parametric than Ch27. Transition words: 0.

如同钟在墙上的位置——不需要每天看它还在不在
不能分出哪一个是Saturday哪一个是催收——交汇在场——基底化了
门框和之前的每一天一样——和之前每一天不一样——走了就是走了
